basic_info.core_architecture: Original self-developed architecture, Chiplet-based large compute chips

products.name: 壁砺™ 166M
products.applications: Large models, multimodal AIGC, image recognition, speech recognition, NLP, recommendation systems

products_and_services.software_ecosystem: Proprietary software stack for AI workloads
technology_highlights: First Chiplet-based large compute chip in China
Original core architecture (not based on foreign IP)

recent_developments.event: 壁仞科技联合模力方舟推出AI技能认证，初级认证现已开放报名
Day0适配 | 壁仞科技高效完成商汤日日新SenseNova U1推理验证
国产算力x央企大模型 | 壁仞科技率先完成中国移动九天35B大模型预适配
壁仞科技壁砺™166系列完成DeepSeek-V4适配验证与优化
Day0适配 | 壁仞科技x腾讯混元，率先支持Hy3 preview语言模型
Day0适配 | 壁仞科技率先支持Kimi K2.6模型，高效赋能AI编程
Day0适配 | 壁仞科技光速支持阿里Qwen3.6-35B-A3B大模型
Day 0适配GLM-5.1｜壁仞科技率先完成智谱新一代旗舰模型适配

abf_relevance.direct_relevance: Medium-High - AI chips require advanced packaging with ABF substrates
abf_relevance.advanced_packaging: Chiplet architecture requires advanced substrate technology
abf_relevance.substrate_dependency: Large compute chips depend on high-layer-count ABF substrates
abf_relevance.market_implication: Growing Chinese AI chip market creates domestic ABF substrate demand

market_position.status: Leading Chinese domestic GPU/AI chip startup
market_position.target_market: AI data centers, smart computing infrastructure
market_position.deployment: Multiple smart computing clusters deployed across China
key_partnerships: China Mobile (中国移动) - JiuTian 35B model

strengths: Original self-developed GPU architecture (not foreign IP dependency)
First Chiplet-based large compute chip in China
Strong ecosystem partnerships with major Chinese AI companies
Day0 model adaptation capability (fast software ecosystem support)
weaknesses: Software ecosystem still maturing vs NVIDIA CUDA
opportunities: Chinese government push for domestic chip self-sufficiency
US export controls creating market opportunity for domestic alternatives
Potential for expansion into edge AI and automotive
threats: US sanctions/export controls on advanced manufacturing equipment
Competition from Huawei Ascend, Cambricon, Moore Threads
Access to advanced process nodes (7nm and below)

sanctions_impact.manufacturing_risk: High - dependent on TSMC/SMIC for advanced nodes
sanctions_impact.equipment_access: May face restrictions on EUV and advanced equipment

notes: Biren Technology website was accessible and provided good data. Company is a leading Chinese GPU startup with strong ecosystem partnerships. Financial data not available as company is private. Recommend monitoring US sanctions impact and manufacturing access.
